svg.text: FREENOVE (plugs into 2 socket strips: row 4 & row 14)
camera sticks up out of this area
• Wires run on the UNDERSIDE (solder side).
• Short by design: SCK/BUSY/DIO1 all on row 14,
right above the radio. 3V3/NSS are the long ones
• Socket the WHOLE radio (all 16 pads) — leaves
DIO2/TXEN/RXEN reachable if power-up needs them.
• A on right, X on left (matches your board).
• Row #s: I put Freenove at rows 4 and 14. If your
board numbers from the other end, just count 10
holes between the two Freenove strips - that's
the only spacing that must be exact.
